calendar.matters:
Petition Of Beneificiary To Remove Trusteee And Appoint Successor Trustee, For Damages, And For Authorization For Trustee To Pay Attorney'S Fees From Trust
Off Calendar May-20-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for and with Veterdata Jones. Daniel Presher for IMT Associates (Trustee). Sharon Toth from IMT also present.

The Court stated that it seems the Trust is being managed in Alameda County. Ms. Young stated that Ms. Jones has decided to stay with Ms. Hayes as the Successor Trustee. Mr. Presher stated that at the moment Alameda County seems appropriate. The Petition of Beneficiary to Remove Trustee and Appoint Successor Trustee, etc. was taken off calendar without prejudice to the petition being re-filed in Alameda County.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Jan-07-2014 Continued To Mar-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for and with Veterdata Jones (Petitioner). Daniel Presher for IMT Associates (Trustee).

The Court indicated that this petition cannot go forward due to Mr. Sanders has declined to serve as Successor Trustee, that the nomination of Sharon Hayes to act is not part of the petition and an amended petition is required. Ms. Young stated that IMT is going to resign in favor of Ms. Hayes and that Ms. Hayes is willing to serve. Mr. Presher confirmed IMT's position. The Petition to Remove Trustee, etc. is continued to March 4, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that Ms. Young will have filed and served the amended petition.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
